message:
ci(test): build browser bundle before playwright

Same root cause as the docs deploy failure (290a879) and the
release.yml gap (2b99ee3): the browser-test job runs `bun x
playwright test` before `npm run build:browser` ever produces
packages/textsift/dist/browser/textsift.wasm. The web server
serves 404s for the wasm and Playwright times out after 15s
waiting for the page to load.

Adds the standard prelude to the browser-test job:
  - jdx/mise-action (Zig on PATH)
  - upstream binaryen 128 (apt's is too old for Zig 0.16 SIMD)
  - npm run build:browser before playwright

Mirrors what docs.yml and release.yml now do.

files.patch:
@@ -167,6 +167,27 @@ jobs:
       - uses: oven-sh/setup-bun@v2
       - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
         with: { node-version: "22" }
+      - uses: jdx/mise-action@v2
+        with:
+          experimental: true
+
+      - name: Install binaryen (wasm-opt) from upstream release
+        # Apt's binaryen is too old to parse the SIMD opcodes Zig 0.16
+        # emits. Pin to match developer Macs (homebrew binaryen 128).
+        run: |
+          set -e
+          BINARYEN_VERSION="version_128"
+          curl -fsSL "https://github.com/WebAssembly/binaryen/releases/download/${BINARYEN_VERSION}/binaryen-${BINARYEN_VERSION}-x86_64-linux.tar.gz" | tar -xz -C /tmp
+          sudo cp -r /tmp/binaryen-${BINARYEN_VERSION}/bin/* /usr/local/bin/
+          sudo cp -r /tmp/binaryen-${BINARYEN_VERSION}/lib/* /usr/local/lib/
+          wasm-opt --version
+
       - run: npm install --no-audit --no-fund
+
+      # Browser tests load packages/textsift/dist/browser/{index.js,textsift.wasm};
+      # build them before playwright spins up the http server.
+      - name: Build textsift browser bundle
+        run: cd packages/textsift && npm run build:browser
+
       - run: bun x playwright install --with-deps chromium
       - run: bun x playwright test
